segments.text: Day Day Day Day Day Dreaming Nightmares!

You uppity fake clown, I'm struggling right now Love muscle cuddle in the knife, see it shine now Suffering high brow, musket at the skull, comfortable to pull Trigger pulling just to strike down BOOM!

Bullet hitting white gowns, motivated psychic Loki, you're the hater touch Can't embrace a faker like the paper to my firebrush Bonded with a liar once, now I see the truth Like an agent smith, smacked me in the face and said You're one of us, hollow fake smiles With a bludgeon and a blunderbuss Blast radius, leaving your corpse in buckets of dust
And I'm standing right there, injecting hatred and rage in your fine tears!

I took the bombs like it knows the bomb hydrochloric bombs pyro war I brought microscopic harm my demonic arm supersonic draw yo suicidal brawl slow you freaks no Hades couldn't catalog victims I've been sending too many

Labels since embryo, placenta, row genetic code, ones and zeros, code, neck mastering, sound and stereo, radio, mesmerio, hitting targets, Brady throw, Play-Doh knows my philosophy, enslave the data hole, cradles with the blades, pappos getting slayed, chaos in the veins, macrocosm shattered like a dinner plate, incinerate rappers, I'm on a different stage, I deliver galactus and stare and make admit mistakes, I'm the fucking bantam of fear, and I accept my place, I'm the aliquar to suffering, yet I refuse to take.
And I'm standing right there, injecting hatred and rage in your fight hairs!
Smiles never last Sufferings evergreen I wonder if she thinks about me As much as I think about her
Sufferings evergreen, and I can't even sleep.
My sorrow lives in my dreams.
She follows me when I'm awake.
Daydreaming Nightmare Daydreaming Nightmare Daydreaming Nightmare Nightmare
